failed.title: Validation failed
failed.detail: One or more fields in your request are invalid. See the errors array for details.

invalid_locale.title: Unsupported locale
invalid_locale.detail: The locale '{requested}' is not supported. Supported locales: en, tr, fr, es, ar, de.

invalid_credentials.title: Invalid credentials
invalid_credentials.detail: The email or password you entered does not match an active account.

jwt_expired.title: Session expired
jwt_expired.detail: Your session has expired. Please refresh your token and try again.

jwt_invalid.title: Invalid token
jwt_invalid.detail: Your authentication token is invalid or malformed. Please sign in again.

refresh_token_reused.title: Session security alert
refresh_token_reused.detail: A reused refresh token was detected. All sessions for this account have been revoked. Please sign in again.

refresh_token_invalid.title: Refresh token invalid
refresh_token_invalid.detail: Your refresh token is missing, expired, or revoked. Please sign in again.

email_not_verified.title: Email not verified
email_not_verified.detail: Please verify your email address before signing in. We can resend the verification email if you need it.

account_disabled.title: Account disabled
account_disabled.detail: This account has been disabled. Contact support if you believe this is an error.

insufficient_role.title: Insufficient permissions
insufficient_role.detail: This action requires one of the following roles: {required}.

ownership_violation.title: Forbidden
ownership_violation.detail: You do not have permission to access this {resource}.

resource_not_found.title: Not found
resource_not_found.detail: The requested {resource} could not be found.

resource_already_exists.title: Conflict
resource_already_exists.detail: A {resource} with the supplied details already exists.

email_already_registered.title: Email already registered
email_already_registered.detail: An account with that email address already exists.

rate_limited.title: Too many requests
rate_limited.detail: You have made too many requests. Try again in {retryAfterSeconds} seconds.

internal.title: Something went wrong
internal.detail: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again. If the problem persists, contact support with the request ID shown in this response.
